servinfo.title: HVAC Control Unit Removal and Installation

s1.ptxt: Remove combination meter cluster panel and center ventilation louver.
Remove audio unit or radio hole cover.
Disconnect temperature control cable (1) and airflow control cable (2) from HVAC unit.
Remove connectors (2) from HVAC control unit.
Remove HVAC control unit (1) from instrument panel.

attention3.ptxt: Use rag to protect HVAC control unit and instrument panel from damage.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure, noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Connect temperature control cable (3) and air flow control cable (4) of HVAC control unit to corresponding links of HVAC unit as follows:
Set airflow selector (1) to “DEF” position and temperature selector (2) to “MAX HOT” position.
Move temperature control lever (1) and airflow control plate (2) fully to the direction of arrow.

Fix temperature control inner cable (1) to pin of temperature control lever and air flow control inner cable (2) to pin of airflow control plate, and then fix each outer cable (3) to each cable lock clamp (4).

attention3.ptxt: After installing control cables, make sure that control lever and plate move smoothly and stop at proper position.

item.ptxt: Make sure that airflow outlet changes correctly as airflow selector is changed.
Make sure that outlet temperature changes correctly as temperature selector is changed.
